title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zappfresh Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Zappfresh Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh Advisory Limited:
Zappfresh Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh Advisory Limited!
